samples.question: Who signed the report on behalf of Apple Inc.?
contexts: The report was signed on behalf of Apple Inc. by the undersigned, Luca Maestri, Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer.
Luca Maestri was duly authorized to sign the report.
samples.ground_truth: Luca Maestri

samples.question: Who are the persons that signed the report on behalf of the Registrant?
contexts: The report has been signed below by the following persons on behalf of the Registrant and in the capacities and on the dates indicated
The signatories include Timothy D. Cook, Luca Maestri, and Chris Kondo
samples.ground_truth: Timothy D. Cook, Luca Maestri, and Chris Kondo

samples.question: Who are the directors and officers of the company as listed on page 73?
contexts: The company's officers and directors include James A. Bell, Al Gore, Alex Gorsky, Andrea Jung, Arthur D. Levinson, Monica Lozano, Ronald D. Sugar, and Susan L. Wagner.
These individuals hold various positions such as Chief Executive Officer, Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, Senior Director of Corporate Accounting, and Directors.
samples.ground_truth: James A. Bell, Al Gore, Alex Gorsky, Andrea Jung, Arthur D. Levinson, Monica Lozano, Ronald D. Sugar, and Susan L. Wagner
